task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Support Triage (AI-assisted)** (Level 9)

Build a support ticket triage system. Tickets have subject, body, from_email, category, priority, status. Use a Claude agent named 'Triage' that receives a ticket and returns a JSON object with {category, priority}. When a new ticket is POSTed, call the Triage agent to classify it before saving. Need: POST /api/tickets (auto-classifies), GET /api/tickets (list), GET /api/tickets/open.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  body
  from_email
  category, default 'General'
  priority, default 'Normal'
  status, default 'open'

agent 'Triage' receives ticket:
  result = ask claude 'You are a support ticket triage agent. Analyze the ticket and determine the appropriate category (bug, feature_request, billing, general, authentication) and priority (low, normal, high, critical). Return a JSON object with category and priority fields.' with ticket returning JSON text:
    category
    priority
  send back result

when user calls POST /api/tickets sending ticket_data:
  validate ticket_data:
    subject is text, required
    from_email is text, required
  categorized = call 'Triage' with ticket_data
  set ticket_data's category to categorized's category
  set ticket_data's priority to categorized's priority
  saved = save ticket_data to Tickets
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/tickets:
  tickets = get all Tickets
  send back tickets

when user calls GET /api/tickets/open:
  tickets = get all Tickets where status is 'open'
  send back tickets

page 'Inbox' at '/':
  on page load get tickets from '/api/tickets/open'
  
  section 'Support Tickets - Inbox':
    heading 'Open Support Tickets'
    display tickets
